a.class: fi-color fi-color-primary fi-bg-color-400 hover:fi-bg-color-300 dark:fi-bg-color-600 dark:hover:fi-bg-color-700 fi-text-color-950 hover:fi-text-color-800 dark:fi-text-color-0 dark:hover:fi-text-color-0 fi-btn fi-size-xs

span.class: fi-color fi-color-primary fi-text-color-700 dark:fi-text-color-300 fi-badge fi-size-md
